http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** DHABA MEAT RECIPE Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 30-35 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2-4 Cloves, लॉन्ग 8-10 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने Prepared Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 5 medium size Onion, chopped, प्याज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर Marinated Mutton, मैरिनेटेड मटन 2-3 cups Water, पानी Prepared Onion Tomato Masala, तैयार किया हुआ प्याज टमाटर मसाला For Ginger Garlic Paste ½ inch Ginger, peeled, slice, अदरक 5-6 Garlic cloves, लहसुन 2 Green chillies, हरी मिर्च For Mutton Marination 800 gms Mutton, with bones, मटन 1 ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही For Onion Tomato Masala 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 tsp Coriander seeds, धनिया के बीज 2 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता 1 large Onion, chopped, प्याज 2 Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 small Tomatoes, chopped, टमाटर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Little water, पानी 1 tbsp tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल For Garnish 1 tsp Dry fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी ½ inch Ginger, julienned, अदरक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process In a cooker, add oil, ghee once it's hot, add black cardamom, cloves, black peppercorns and let it splutter well. Add ginger garlic paste, onion and saute it well for 5 minutes. Add salt to taste and saute it until light brown in color. Add coriander powder and mix well. Add marinated mutton and mix it well. Add water and mix well. Cover it with a lid and cook on medium flame for 5-6 whistles. Let it cool at room temperature until pressure inside the cooker goes down naturally. Open the lid, add prepared onion tomato masala and mix it well. Just cover it with the lid without a whistle and cook on medium flame for 5-7 minutes . Transfer it into a serving bowl, garnish it with dry fenugreek leaves, ginger, coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti or steam rice. For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic, green chillies and grind it into a rough paste and keep aside for further use. For Mutton Marination In a large bowl, add mutton, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, salt to taste, curd and marinated well. Keep it for 10-15 minutes. For Onion Tomato Masala In a shallow pan, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, bay leaf and let it splutter well. Add onion, green chillies and saute it well, add coriander powder, degi red chilli powder mix it well. Add tomatoes, salt to taste and saute well. add little water and let it cook on medium flame for 2-4 minutes. Add tender coriander stems and mix it well. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #DhabaMuttoncurry #dhabameatrecipe #ranveerbrar #Dhabamutton #कुकरढाबामटनकरी #मटनकरी #spicymutton #muttoncurry #muttonrecipe #muttonbiryani #Dhabagosht #cookermuttoncurry #muttonkulambu #dhabastylemutton #militaryhotelmuttoncurry #muttoncurryranveerbrar

raw_text: POTATO NUGGETS 2 WAYS | कुरकुरे आलू नगेट्स - Not 1 but 2 types of Potato Nuggets for those evening snack cravings :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Veg Nuggets - https://youtu.be/I1qdTEyxV64 Potato Twister without Machine - https://youtu.be/4oRb9No2ZeQ Cheese balls - https://youtu.be/ZGr21doxCNU *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** CRISPY POTATO NUGGETS Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Potato Nuggets Type 1 1 tbsp Butter, cube 1 tsp Oil 2-4 Garlic cloves, chopped 1 tsp Chilli flakes 1 ⅓ cup Water ½ tsp Sugar Salt to taste 2 large sized potato, peeled 1 ⅓ cups Rice flour 2 medium size Potato, peeled, grated 1 tbsp Butter, cube 2 medium size Potatoes, boiled, grated Salt to taste ⅓ cup Bread crumbs ¼ tsp Baking powder ¼ tsp Baking soda ½ tsp Black pepper powder ¼ cup Pizza cheese, blend For Potato Nuggets Type 2 1 tbsp Butter, cube 1 tsp Oil 2-3 Garlic cloves, chopped 1 tsp Chilli flakes ½ cups Water 2 large Potatoes, peeled, grated Salt to taste ½ tsp Sugar ¼ tsp Turmeric powder ½ cup Rice flour 1 tbsp Butter 1 large Potato, peeled, grated For Coating ½ cup Refined flour Salt to taste ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder For Batter 1 cup Refined flour Salt to taste ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder ½ cup Water For Coating 1 ½ cups fresh Bread crumbs Oil for frying For Schezwan Style Nuggets 2-3 tsp Schezwan sauce Fried Potato Nuggets Type 2, few Spring onion, chopped For Garnish Spring onion Tomato, wedges Coriander sprig Note: In 1 cup of rice flour, add ¾ cup of water. Process ForPotato Type 1 Take a bowl, add water, peeled potatoes and keep aside for further use. Take a kadai or shallow pan, add butter, and oil once the butter is melted. Add garlic, chilli flakes, water, salt to taste, and sugar. Add grated potatoes and cook on medium flame for 2-3 minutes. Add rice flour and mix it well, add butter and cook it well. Add the other half grated potato and mix it well. Once it is cooked well, transfer it into a tray. Keep in a refrigerator until it cools down completely. In another bowl, add boiled grated potatoes, add the cooked potato mixture. Add salt to taste, bread crumbs, baking powder, baking soda, black pepper powder. Add pizza cheese blend and mix everything well. Divide the mixture into small bite size portions and give it any shape you desire. Repeat this and make with the rest of the mixture. Heat oil in a kadai, once the oil is medium hot. Meanwhile, take one shaped nuggets and coat it in the season flour, now dip the shaped nuggets in the slurry and then in a fresh bread crumb and coat it properly from all sides. Repeat this process for all other balls. Heat oil in a kadai, dip one by one nuggets into the oil. Fry on medium to from all the sides until golden in color and crisp. Remove on an absorbent paper and keep aside. Garnish it with spring onion, coriander sprig, tomato and serve hot with ketchup. For Potato Nuggets Type 2 In a shallow non-stick pan, add butter, oil once it's melted, add garlic, chilli flakes and saute it well. Add water, grated potatoes, salt to taste, sugar and cook on medium flame. Add turmeric powder and mix it well. Add rice flour and mix it well. Once the potatoes are half cooked, add butter and mix it well. Now, add the other half grated potatoes and mix well. Switch off the flame. Let it cook on its own heat. Transfer it into a tray and Keep in a refrigerator until it cools down completely. Onces it cools down, transfer it into a bowl and mix it well. Divide the mixture into small bite size portions and give it any shape you desire. Heat oil in a kadai, dip one by one nuggets into the oil. Fry on medium to from all the sides until golden in color and crisp. Remove on an absorbent paper and keep aside. For Schezwan Style Nuggets In a deep pan or wok, add schezwan sauce, type 2 fried potato nuggets and toss everything well. Add Spring onion and toss well. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. For Coating In a bowl, add refined flour, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder mix well. Keep aside for further use. For Batter In a bowl, make slurry by mixing refined flour, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder and water, it should be a coating consistency. #Potatonuggets #Potatorecipes #Ranveerbrar #potatonuggetsrecipe #potatonuggetswithcheese #cheesynuggets #mozarellanuggets#potatonuggetseasyrecipe #potatonuggetsinhindi #alootikki#pakode #stuffedpotato #potatonuggetsathome

ingredients: 2 tbsp Ghee (घी) | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds (जीरा) | 1 inch Ginger - chopped (अदरक) | 2-3 fresh Green Chillies - chopped (हरी मिर्च) | 4-5 cloves Garlic - chopped (लहसुन) | 1 medium whole Cauliflower - cut in florets (फूलगोभी) | 2 medium Potatoes - medium diced (आलू) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 2 tbsp Coriander Leaves - chopped (धनिया पत्ता) | ½ tsp Turmeric Powder (हल्दी पाउडर) | ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | ¼ tsp Asafoetida (हींग) | ½ tsp Cumin Powder (जीरा पाउडर)
instructions: For Masala Mixture | In a bowl add water, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, asafoetida, cumin powder and mix everything properly then keep aside for further use. | For Aloo Gobi Sabzi | In a kadai heat ghee and add cumin seeds, ginger, green chillies, garlic and saute for a few seconds then add the prepared masala mixture and saute until the ghee starts separating. | Now add cauliflower, potatoes, salt, water and mix everything properly. | Then cover and cook on low heat for 10-12 minutes. | Remove the lid and stir in the chopped coriander leaves. | Switch off the flames then cover and keep aside for 2-3 minutes. | Then serve in a serving bowl and garnish with coriander leaves. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

title: Dhaba Anda Masala | ढाबा अंडा मसाला झटपट | no peeling no boiling Eggs Quick recipe | Chef Ranveer
description: DHABA STYLE SPICY EGG MASALA CURRY | अंडा करी मसाला - This dish can be both a treat and a lazy lunch, honest! Sometimes, nothing can be more comforting than a spicy Egg/ Anda curry masala...Sunday ho ya Monday, zaroor khayein Ande!! *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: 3 Green chillies, हरी मिर्च | 4-5 Garlic cloves, लहसुन | 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी | 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल | 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | Prepared Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | 3 medium size Onion, chopped, प्याज | 1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder,धनिया पाउडर | 2 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 3 medium size Tomato, chopped, टमाटर | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी | 1 tsp Dry fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी | 1 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 8 no. whole Eggs, अंडे | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tsp Ghee, घी
instructions: For Ginger Garlic Paste | In a mortar pestle, add green chillies, ginger, garlic,cloves and grind it into a rough paste and keep aside for further use. | For Egg Masala | In a shallow pan, add ghee, oil and once it's hot, add prepared ginger garlic paste, cumin seeds and let it splutter well. | Add onion and saute until it's translucent. | Add coriander powder, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder and saute it well. | Add salt to taste, tomatoes, sugar and mix it well. | Cover it with the lid and cook on low flame. | Once the tomatoes are soft, add water and mix it well. | Cover it with the lid and cook for 5 minutes. | Add crushed dry fenugreek leaves, coriander leaves and mix it well. | Once done, transfer it into a serving dish, place the prepared egg cake on top. | Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. | For Egg Cake | In a bowl break eggs, add salt to taste, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, ghee and whisk it well. | For Steaming | Take a medium size bowl, pour the egg mixture into the bowl and let it steam for 10 minutes. | Or until it's properly done. | Remove it from the pan, demould the egg cake and cut into desired shape. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Sometimes, nothing can be more comforting than a spicy Egg/ Anda curry masala...Sunday ho ya Monday, zaroor khayein Ande!! *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/EggRecipesbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** DHABA STYLE ANDA CURRY Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Ginger Garlic Paste 3 Green chillies, हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, peeled, slice, अदरक 4-5 Garlic cloves, लहसुन For Egg Masala 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा Prepared Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 3 medium size Onion, chopped, प्याज 1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder,धनिया पाउडर 2 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 3 medium size Tomato, chopped, टमाटर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी Little water, पानी 1 tsp Dry fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी 1 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Egg Cake 8 no. whole Eggs, अंडे Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Ghee, घी Other Ingredients Ghee (for greasing) घी Water (for steaming) पानी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add green chillies, ginger, garlic,cloves and grind it into a rough paste and keep aside for further use. For Egg Masala In a shallow pan, add ghee, oil and once it's hot, add prepared ginger garlic paste, cumin seeds and let it splutter well. Add onion and saute until it's translucent. Add coriander powder, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder and saute it well. Add salt to taste, tomatoes, sugar and mix it well. Cover it with the lid and cook on low flame. Once the tomatoes are soft, add water and mix it well. Cover it with the lid and cook for 5 minutes. Add crushed dry fenugreek leaves, coriander leaves and mix it well. Once done, transfer it into a serving dish, place the prepared egg cake on top. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. For Egg Cake In a bowl break eggs, add salt to taste, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, ghee and whisk it well. For Steaming Take a medium size bowl, pour the egg mixture into the bowl and let it steam for 10 minutes. Or until it's properly done. Remove it from the pan, demould the egg cake and cut into desired shape. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #AndaMasalarecipe #Andacurryrecipe #Ranveerbrar #eggmasala #eggcurry #Dhabastyleandacurry #andacurryandhrastyle #andamasalacurry #spicyandacurry #Masalaomelette #muttakulambu #eggmasalacurry

http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** PANEER CRISPY Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2 Ingredients For Marination 400 gms Paneer, cut into medium size, पनीर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 ½ tsp toasted Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल 1 ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ cup Cornflour, कॉर्नफ्लोर For Batter 1 tbsp Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च ½ cup Refined flour, मैदा ¼ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा A pinch of salt, नमक 1 cup Water, पानी 1 tbsp Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Paste ½ inch Ginger, peeled, slice, अदरक 4-5 Garlic cloves, लहसुन For Sauce 2 tsp Oil, तेल Prepared Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tsp toasted Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल 2 tsp Schezwan sauce, शेज़वान सॉस 2 Dry red chillies, broken into half, सूखी लाल मिर्च 2 tbsp Water, पानी 2 tbsp Tomato ketchup, टाॅमेटो केचप 1 tsp Red chilli sauce, (optional) रेड चिली सॉस ¼ tsp Soy sauce, सोया सॉस Water, पानी ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Fried Paneer, तला हुआ पनीर ½ tsp toasted Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल 1 tbsp Spring onion, chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता For Tempering 1 tsp Oil, तेल 2 Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन 1 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च Fried Paneer, तला हुआ पनीर ½ tbsp tender Coriander stem, chopped, धनिया के डंठल A pinch of degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Garnish Tempura trimmings, टेम्पुरा ट्रिमिंग्स Spring onions, chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता A pinch of degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Process For Marination In a bowl, add paneer, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, toasted sesame seeds, degi red chili powder and mix everything well. Add corn flour or arrowroot powder and mix it well and keep it aside for further use. For Batter In a bowl, add cornstarch, refined flour, baking soda, salt, water and mix everything well. Make sure there's no lumps, keep aside for further use. For Frying Heat oil in a kadai on medium flame, once the oil is medium hot. Dip the first marinated paneer into the batter and coat it well. Dip into the hot oil and fry on medium to low flame. Remove in an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. Fry them again so that it turns evenly crisp and golden in color. Drain them in an absorbent paper to remove excess oil. Drizzle the remaining batter into the hot oil and deep fry on medium flame until golden in color and crisp. Remove in an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic and and make a rough paste of it and keep aside for further use. For Sauce In a deep kadai or wok, add oil, prepared ginger garlic paste and saute well. Add toasted sesame seeds, schezwan sauce, dry red chillies and mix it well. Add little water, tomato ketchup, red chilli sauce, soy sauce and water mix everything well on medium flame. Add sugar, salt to taste, fried paneer and toss everything well. Finish it with toasted sesame seeds, spring onion. Garnish with tempura trimming and serve hot. For Tempering Heat oil in a wok, add garlic, green chilli and saute it well. Add fred paneer, tender coriander stem, degi red chilli and toss everything well. Garnish with spring onion and serve hot. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #CrispyPaneer #PaneerChillirecipe #Ranveerbrar #Paneerdrystarter #Chillipaneerdry #Paneermanchurian #Paneermanchuriandry #Paneer65 #Paneergheeroast #Paneerkisabji #paneerstarter #Paneertikka #Acharipaneer #Paneertikkamasala #Paneerbhurji #Paneerrecipes #Paneerparatha #Paneertikkaathome #Paneermasala

Add salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder and mix it well. Add water and mix everything well. Cover it with the lid and simmer it on medium flame for 10-12 minutes. Garnish it with coriander sprig, sprinkle some prepared masala and serve hot. For Curd Mixture In a bowl, add curd, coriander powder, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder and mix well. Keep aside for further use. For Masala In a pan, add black cardamom, black peppercorns and dry roast on low flame until the spices turn aromatic. title: 10 mins में चटपटा रवा नाश्ता । Mini Idli no steamer | Idli Fry | Sooji snack | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: SOOJI SE JHATPAT NAASHTA | रवा इडली बिना steamer - As long as you have some Sooji/Rawa / Semolina on hand, there's no end to the number of recipes you can create! Like this one.. #soojikanashta #quicksnackrecipe #ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭𝗢𝗡 𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗣🍽️
ingredients: 1 tbsp Ghee, घी | 1 tsp Mustard seeds, बारीक राई | ½ cup Water or Coconut milk (optional) पानी/नारियल के दूध | ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 1 cup Semolina, रवा/सूजी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही | Water as required, पानी | ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 tsp Ghee, घी | Prepared Sooji Gulgule, तैयार किया हुआ सूजी के गुलगुले | 1 tbsp Ghee, घी | 1 tsp Gota urad dal, गोटा उरद | 1 tsp Chana dal, चना दाल | ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | ½ tsp Mustard seed, बारीक राई | 1 inch Ginger, chopped, अदरक | 2 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ता | 2 dry Red chillies, chopped, सूखी लाल मिर्च | 2 Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च | 1 tbsp Peanut, मूंगफली | A pinch of turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | Prepared Sooji Gulgule, तैयार किया हुआ सूजी के गुलगुले | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी | ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
instructions: For Sooji Ke Gulgule | In a kadai, add ghee once it's hot, add mustard seeds and let it splutter well. | Add water or coconut milk, sugar, salt to taste, turmeric powder and mix well. | Add semolina and mix everything properly and continue cooking until soft dough or it comes together. | Add a little water, salt to taste, curd and mix it well until it completely absorbs its water. | Once done transfer it into a bowl and knead it properly. | In a parat, place the prepared mixture and knead it properly. | Pinch a lemon size ball and flatten it slightly, press in the center to give a shape and keep aside for further use. | In a large kadai, add water on medium flames, Add sugar, salt to taste, ghee and mix it well. | Keep the flame on simmer and let it boil for a few seconds. | Add prepared sooji ke gulgule and let it get cooked for 2 to 3 minutes. | Once gulgule gets cooked well switch off the flame and transfer into the parat. | Keep in the refrigerator for 2 to 3 minutes. | Once it holds the shape, remove it out and keep aside for further use. | For Tempering | In a large kadai or wok, add ghee once it's hot, add gota urad dal, chana dal and saute it until light golden in color. | Add cumin seeds, mustard seeds and let it splutter well. | Add ginger, curry leaves and saute well. | Add dry red chillies, green chillies, peanuts and toss everything well. | Add a pinch of turmeric powder, prepare sooji ke gulgule, sprinkle little water, salt to taste, and sugar, and toss everything well. | Now, add coriander leaves, mint leaves, lemon juice and toss everything well. | Transfer it into a serving dish. | Garnish it with fresh coconut bits, lemon wedge, coriander sprig and serve hot.

RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Knives I use 🔪 - https://bit.ly/KnivesIuse *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Sooji Gulab Jamun - https://youtu.be/KxmvIbygB_E Rawa Uthappam - https://youtu.be/CFfpuvTEg2A Instant Sooji cutlet - https://youtu.be/D3JXEo8_LQQ *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** JHATPAT SOOJI NAASHTA (Sooji ke Gulgule) Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Sooji Ke Gulgule 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tsp Mustard seeds, बारीक राई ½ cup Water or Coconut milk (optional) पानी/नारियल के दूध ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 cup Semolina, रवा/सूजी Little water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही For Boiling Water as required, पानी ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Ghee, घी Prepared Sooji Gulgule, तैयार किया हुआ सूजी के गुलगुले For Tempering 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tsp Gota urad dal, गोटा उरद 1 tsp Chana dal, चना दाल ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tsp Mustard seed, बारीक राई 1 inch Ginger, chopped, अदरक 2 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ता 2 dry Red chillies, chopped, सूखी लाल मिर्च 2 Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Peanut, मूंगफली A pinch of turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Prepared Sooji Gulgule, तैयार किया हुआ सूजी के गुलगुले Little water,पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी few Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता fresh Mint leaves, chopped, पुदीने के पत्ते ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Garnish fresh Coconut bits (optional) ताजा नारियल Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Sooji Ke Gulgule In a kadai, add ghee once it's hot, add mustard seeds and let it splutter well. Add water or coconut milk, sugar, salt to taste, turmeric powder and mix well. Add semolina and mix everything properly and continue cooking until soft dough or it comes together. Add a little water, salt to taste, curd and mix it well until it completely absorbs its water. Once done transfer it into a bowl and knead it properly. In a parat, place the prepared mixture and knead it properly. Pinch a lemon size ball and flatten it slightly, press in the center to give a shape and keep aside for further use. For Boiling In a large kadai, add water on medium flames, Add sugar, salt to taste, ghee and mix it well. Keep the flame on simmer and let it boil for a few seconds. Add prepared sooji ke gulgule and let it get cooked for 2 to 3 minutes. Once gulgule gets cooked well switch off the flame and transfer into the parat. Keep in the refrigerator for 2 to 3 minutes. Once it holds the shape, remove it out and keep aside for further use. For Tempering In a large kadai or wok, add ghee once it's hot, add gota urad dal, chana dal and saute it until light golden in color. Add cumin seeds, mustard seeds and let it splutter well. Add ginger, curry leaves and saute well. Add dry red chillies, green chillies, peanuts and toss everything well. Add a pinch of turmeric powder, prepare sooji ke gulgule, sprinkle little water, salt to taste, and sugar, and toss everything well. Now, add coriander leaves, mint leaves, lemon juice and toss everything well. Transfer it into a serving dish. Garnish it with fresh coconut bits, lemon wedge, coriander sprig and serve hot. #instantidli #idliwithoutsteamer #chaatrecipe #tadkaidli #masalaid#idlifry #idlirecipe #rawaidli #soojiidli #quickidli #binasteameridli #snackrecipe

http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** CHICKEN TANGDI KABAB Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2 Ingredients For First Marination 8 no Chicken Drumsticks, चिकन टंगड़ी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 Green chillies, less spicy, chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 ½ tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tbsp tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल 3 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही For Masala ¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना 12-15 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 5-6 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2 Cloves, लॉन्ग ½ inch Mace, जावित्री ¼ tsp Dry fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Second Marination 2-3 heaped tbsp Plain Cheese spread, चीज़ स्प्रैड ⅓ cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp roasted Gram flour, भुने चने का बेसन few Mint leaves, finely chopped, पुदीने के पत्ते 1 tsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला First Marination Juice, पहले मैरीनेशन के पानी For Cooking First Marinated Chicken 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 Black cardamom seeds, काली इलायची के दाने 2-3 Cloves, लॉन्ग 2-3 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता First Marinated Chicken, पहले मैरिनेटेड चिकन For Smoke Coal, कोयला ½ tsp Ghee, घी 2 Cloves, लॉन्ग Other Ingredients Ghee for brushing, घी For Garnish Onion, slice, प्याज Tomato, julienned, टमाटर Capsicum, julienned, शिमला मिर्च Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Cutting Drumsticks Slit the drumstick on the bottom and remove the excess fats, and place the drumsticks in a mixing bowl. For First Marination In a mixing bowl, add salt to taste on drumsticks, add green chilli, ginger garlic paste, coriander stem, curd and mix it well and keep it aside for further use. For Masala In a small plate, add fenugreek seeds, black peppercorns, green cardamom, black cardamom, cloves, mace, dried fenugreek leaves and salt to taste. Transfer it into a grinder jar and grind it into a fine powder. Keep aside for further use. For Second Marination In a mixing bowl, add plain cheese spread, hung curd, roasted gram flour, lemon juice, salt to taste, mint leaves, prepared masala and mix it well. Add the first marination juice and mix everything well. Apply the marination on cooked drumsticks and keep it aside for further use. For Cooking In a shallow pan or kadhai, add ghee once it gets hot, add first marinated chicken. Cover it with the lid and cook on medium flame until 70 to75% done. When it's cooked well. Switch off the flame and remove the drumstick in a tray. Keep the first marination juice for further use. Apply the marination on cooked drumsticks and keep it aside for further use. Now, put the marinated chicken in skewers and cook on medium flame. Cook from both the sides nicely. Remove it on a plate, apply ghee on it. Garnish it with coriander sprig, lemon wedge, onion, tomato and Serve hot . *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickentangdi #chickenleg #tangdikebab #chickentikka #chickenkabab #tangadikabab #chickendrumstick #chickendryroast #chickenbiryani #chickenwings #chickenroast #roastchicken

Star anise 5 no. Cloves ¼ tsp Asafoetida 20 gms Dry red chilli 5 gms Salt 5 gms Cinnamon stick 5 gms Bay leaf 3 gms Dry ginger powder 3 gms Dry mango powder 2.5 gms Turmeric powder For Tempering Masala Pav 1 tbsp Butter,cubes 1 medium size Capsicum, roughly chopped 1 medium size Tomato, roughly chopped 4 no. Ladi pav 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder For Cheese Masala Pav 1 cup Zingy Parcel Masala little Water Prepared masala Pav For Assembling ½ cup Pizza cheese blend ¼ cup Water For Garnish ½ Onion, chopped 1 tsp Lemon juice few Coriander leaves, chopped For Zingy Parcel Filling 3 tbsp Butter, cubes 1 tsp Oil 2 medium size Onion, finely chopped 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste 3 medium size Tomato, finely chopped 1 medium size Capsicum, finely chopped 1 tbsp Butter, cubes Salt to taste 2 tsp Degi red chilli powder Prepared Pav Bhaji Masala 2 medium size Potato, boiled, peeled 2 Green chilli, chopped 1 tbsp Butter, cubes 1 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped 1 tsp Lemon juice Other Ingredients 4-6 Bread slice, trim the edges little Water Prepared Pav Bhaji Filling Pizza cheese blend Oil for shallow fry Pav Bhaji Masala or Degi red chilli powder For Garnish Prepared Pav Bhaji Filling Prepared Zingy Parcel Coriander sprig Lemon wedge Process For Pav Bhaji Masala Heat a pan on low heat and add coriander seeds, cumin seeds, black peppercorns, black cardamom, fennel seeds. Add star anise, cloves, asafoetida, dry red chilli, salt, cinnamon stick, bay leaf and roast them until fragrant. Add dry ginger powder, dry mango powder, turmeric powder and let it cool. Then grind it into a powder and sieve it through a medium sieve. Set aside for further use. For Tempering Masala Pav In a pan, add butter,once the butter is melted, add capsicum, tomato and toss well. Add ladi pav, degi red chilli powder and toss everything well. For Cheese Masala Pav In the same pan, add remaining zingy parcel masala and mash everything properly with a masher. add a little water and mix it well. Cook for another 2-3 minutes, add prepared masala pav and mix everything well. For Assembling In a small pan, add little water, prepare masala pav and top it up with pizza cheese blend. Cover it with the lid and cook until the cheese melts completely. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. For Zingy Parcel Filling In a shallow pan, add butter, oil, onion and saute until translucent. Add ginger garlic paste and saute it well. Add tomato, capsicum and saute it well. Add butter and cook until the tomatoes turn soft in texture. Add salt to taste, degi red chilli powder and mix it well. Cook on medium flame for 2-3 minutes. Add prepared pav bhaji masala and mix it well. Add mashed potato, green chilli, butter and mix everything well. Once done remove half of the filling in a tray and keep it in a refrigerator for 5 minutes to cooldown and the other half for cheese masala pav. Remove the tray from the refrigerator, add coriander leaves, lemon juice and mix it well. For Shaping Trim the side of the bread slice and slightly roll it with the rolling pin, apply little water. Add the prepared filling in the center of the bread slice and top it with pizza cheese blend. Lift opposite sides and bring together at the center, then lift the other two ends and bring it to the center, seal it completely from all the sides properly. Heat oil in a shallow pan, on low flame fry the prepared zingy parcel until it's crisp from base. Remove on plate, sprinkle pav bhaji masala or degi red chilli powder. In a serving dish or platter, add prepared zingy masala, zingy parcels. Garnish it with coriander sprig, lemon wedge and serve hot. 🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼 The Hope Lounge by Dr Paranoid Best of Luck - Katrina Stone Dusty Waves by Lalinea Delilah by WEARETHEGOOD Mazal Tov by Eran Barber Magic Paper by MEOD Anyway by Kyle Cox Futuristic Cliche by Curtis Cole Zariz by Nadaz On The Bus by Cesare Pastanella Music Source : artlist.io Unlimited License Number - 133759 License Owner : Ranveer Brar 🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼🎼 #pavbhajirecipe #pavbhajimasala

raw_text: MATAR SAMOSA CHAAT | मटर समोसे की चाट - Winter special Matar Samosa chaat is a must must try recipe. In this video, you get recipes for - cooking Green peas/Matar, mini Samosa and Samosa chaat, all in one. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Matar ki Kachori - https://youtu.be/dBN-CjBwUnQ Matar ki Tikki Chaat - https://youtu.be/vf7iPtzNBkw *********************** MATAR SAMOSA KI CHAAT Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 30-35 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Samosa Filling 2-3 tbsp Ghee 2 Green chilli, chopped ½ inch Ginger, chopped 2 cups Green peas Salt to taste ⅓ cup fresh Mint leaves, chopped little Water ½ tsp Sugar 1 tsp Ghee ¼ inch Ginger, chopped few Mint leaves, chopped 1 Green chilli, chopped ½ tbsp Prepared Chaat Masala For Tamarind Chutney 1 liter Water 1 cup Tamarind, soaked 2 cups Jaggery For Tempering Chutney 1 tbsp Oil 2 Cloves 1 tsp Cumin seeds 2 dry Red chillies 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder A pinch of asafoetida For Chaat Masala 2 tbsp Black peppercorns 1 tbsp Coriander seed 1 tbsp Fennel seed 1no Black cardamom seeds ½ tbsp Cumin seeds Salt to taste For Dough 1 cup Refined flour ½ tsp Carom seeds, crushed Salt to taste 1 tbsp Ghee chilled Water as required Other Ingredients Oil for frying For Masala 1 tbsp Ghee 2-3 Green chilli, slit into half Salt to taste ½ inch Ginger, julienned ⅓ cup Prepared Samosa Filling little Water 1 tsp Prepared Chaat masala For Garnish Prepared Masala Curd, beaten and seasoned Prepared Samosa Prepared Tamarind chutney Curd, beaten and seasoned Pomegranate pearl Sev few Coriander sprig A pinch of Prepared chaat masala Process Samosa Filling In a shallow pan or kadai, heat ghee, add green chilli, ginger, mint leaves and saute it well. Add green peas, salt to taste and saute. Cover-cook for 5 mins on medium flame. Once the green peas are cooked well, add a little water & mix it well. Cover-cook again for a while. Once the green peas are cooked well, mash them, add sugar and saute for a minute. Now, add ghee & stir well. Switch off the flame, add ginger, mint leaves, green chilli and mix well. Transfer the prepared filling into the plate or tray and keep in the refrigerator for a while. Tamarind Chutney In a saucepot, add water, tamarind, jaggery and cover - cook for 15 to 20 minutes. Once it has cooked well, strain the mixture & keep aside for further use. Tempering Chutney Heat oil in a handi, add cloves & let splutter. Add cumin seeds, dry red chilli and let splutter well. Pour the prepared chutney and mix properly. Add degi red chilli powder, asafoetida and mix well. Cook on medium heat for 10-15 minutes. Once the chutney thickened nicely. Transfer to a bowl and keep aside for further use. For Chaat Masala In a bowl, add black peppercorns, coriander seed, black cardamom seed, fennel seed, cumin seeds, salt to taste. Transfer into a pan and dry roast the spices on medium flame. Once it cools down, transfer it into a grinder and grind it coarsely . keep it aside for future use. For Dough In a parat, add refined flour, carom seeds, salt to taste, ghee and mix everything properly until it resembles bread crumb consistency. Now, add chilled water and knead a hard dough. Cover and keep aside for resting at least for 15-20 minutes. For Assembling Take a medium portion of the dough, make a round peda, apply ghee and roll it thin in an oval shape. Now, cut in from the center and take one half of it and make a cone shape of it and add the prepared filling in it. Now apply water on the open ends of the cone and fold it towards you, keep it down and give it a gentle press so that it can stand, make all others in the similar way. Heat oil in a kadhai on medium heat and fry the samosas on low to medium heat, until it turns golden in color from all the sides, remove on an absorbent paper. For Masala Add ghee in a pan, once ghee is hot, add green chilli, ginger and saute them well. Add prepared samosa filling, salt to taste and mix well. Add little water, prepared chaat masala and mix them nicely and keep it aside for further use. For Garnish In a serving plate, place the prepared masala, seasoned curd, prepared samosa, curd, prepared tamarind chutney, sprinkle prepared chaat masala, pomegranate pearl, sprinkle sev, coriander sprig and serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** #MatarSamosa #Samosarecipe #ranveerbrar #matarkesamose #minisamosa #Samosakaisebanatehain #samosabananekividhi #samosaathome #halwaijaisesamose #howtomakesamosa #Greenpessamosa #Samosafilling #bazaarjaisesamose #aloosamosa #winterrecipes #मटरसमोसेकीचाट #chaatrecipe #समोसाचाट #समोसा

RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Knives I use 🔪 - https://bit.ly/KnivesIuse *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Chicken 65 - https://youtu.be/DZtqRaHYsf8 Gobi 65 + Roll - https://youtu.be/yLI9sYyErDY Soya Malai Chaap - https://youtu.be/fcijKMdJZc4 Soya Chilli Manchurian - https://youtu.be/uwOImPdiHE8 *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** SOYA 65 Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2 Ingredients For Soaking 2 cups Warm water, गुनगुना पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 1 ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida (optional) हींग 1 ½ cups Soya Nuggets, सोया नगेट्स For Marination Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp curd, beaten, दही 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग ¼ cup Rice flour, चावल का आटा ½ tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tbsp Rice flour or Cornstarch, चावल का आटा For Tadka 1 ½ tsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Mustard seeds, बारीक राई ¼ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 1 inch Ginger, chopped, अदरक 2-3 Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन 3 Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च 2 sprig Curry leave, करी पत्ते Fried Soya Nuggets, तले हुए सोया नगेट्स 1 tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 tsp Lemon juice (optional) नींबू का रस 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता Other Ingredients Oil for Frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Process For Soaking In a bowl, add lukewarm water, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, curd and mix well. Add degi red chilli powder, asafoetida and mix well. Add soya nuggets in it and soak it for 10 to 15 minutes. For Cooking In a pan or wok, add soaked soya nuggets and cook for a while. Strain the soya nuggets and transfer into a mixing bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Marination In a bowl, add soaked and cooked soya nuggets, salt to taste, curd and mix it well. Add degi red chilli powder, asafoetida and mix well. Add rice flour, ginger garlic paste and coat the soya nuggets properly. Once again add rice flour or cornstarch before frying for coating. For Frying Heat oil in a kadhai on low to medium heat. Once oil gets hot, add marinated soya nuggets and fry on medium flame until it turns light golden in color. Remove on an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. Once again heat the oil on high flame, add soya nuggets and fry until crisp in texture. For Tadka Heat a pan or wok on medium heat, add oil once oil gets hot, add mustard seeds, fennel seeds and let it splutter. Now add garlic, ginger saute for a while. Add curry leaves, green chilli and saute them nicely. Add fried soya nuggets and toss well, add black pepper powder, degi red chilli powder and tossed everything well, add lemon juice and tossed once again. Switch off the flame, add coriander leaves and toss well. Garnish with coriander sprig, lemon wedge and serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #सोयाबीनचिली #Soyachunksrecipe #soyaprotein #Soyachaap #soyachilli #soyamanchurian #Soya #soywadi #nutrela #soyabeankisabji #soyachaaprecipe #soyareciperanveerbrar #soyaalookisabji #soyawadikisabji #soyabeanbiryani #soybean #soyavadikaisepakatehain

title: दही मटन , सिर्फ़ पाँच चीज़ों से आसान मीट करी | Dahi wala Gosht | Mutton curry recipe | Ranveer Brar
description: दही वाला मटन | DAHI WALA MUTTON - The best things in life should be kept simple, like this Mutton curry. Trust me, you need very few ingredients for this..and of course, Dahi wala mutton ke liye aapko chahiye? :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: 2 inch Ginger, peeled, slice, अदरक | 2 Green chilli, cut into half, हरी मिर्च | 10-12 Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 4-5 tbsp Ghee, घी | 2-3 Cloves, लॉन्ग | 2 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची | 5-6 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने | 2 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता | 3 medium size Onion, sliced, प्याज | 600 gms Mutton, curry cut, (with bones) मटन | Prepared Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2-4 Dry red chilli, सूखी लाल मिर्च | 1 tbsp tender Coriander stem, roughly chopped, धनिया के डंठल | A pinch of asafoetida (optional), हींग | 1 tsp Coriander powder (optional), धनिया पाउडर | 1 ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही | 1 ½ cup Water, पानी | 1 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, roughly chopped, पुदीने के पत्ते | 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता | ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी | ¾ tsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला | 2-3 tbsp Cashew nut paste, काजू का पेस्ट | 12-15 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने | 3 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची | 6-7 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची | ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
instructions: For Ginger Garlic Paste | In a mortar pestle, add ginger, green chilli, garlic and salt to taste. | Make a coarse paste and keep it aside for further use. | For Tempering | In a handi or kadhai, add ghee once the ghee is hot, add cloves, black cardamom, black peppercorns, bay leaf and let it splutter well. | Add onions and saute it well. | Add mutton, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste and saute on medium flame. | Add dry red chillies and saute it properly. | Add coriander stem and mix everything well, add asafoetida, coriander powder and saute it well. | Add curd and mix it continuously on medium flame. | Add the water and mix it well. | Transfer the mutton into the pressure cooker. | Take 5 to 6 whistles and remove the pressure cooker from the flame. | Rest for a while and open the lid and add mint leaves, coriander leaves, sugar and mix well. | Add prepared masala and mix everything well. | Once again place the pressure cooker on the flame. | Add cashew paste to thicken the gravy. | Get one quick boil and remove from the flame. | Transfer it onto a serving plate. | Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. | In a pan add black peppercorns, black cardamom, green cardamom, fennel seeds, salt to taste. | Dry roast on low flame until the spices turn aromatic. | Transfer it into a grinder jar and grind it into a fine powder. | Keep it aside for further use. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** DAHI WALA MUTTON Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 30-35 minutes Serve 2 Ingredients For Ginger Garlic Paste 2 inch Ginger, peeled, slice, अदरक 2 Green chilli, cut into half, हरी मिर्च 10-12 Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Tempering 4-5 tbsp Ghee, घी 2-3 Cloves, लॉन्ग 2 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 5-6 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 2 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता 3 medium size Onion, sliced, प्याज 600 gms Mutton, curry cut, (with bones) मटन Prepared Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-4 Dry red chilli, सूखी लाल मिर्च 1 tbsp tender Coriander stem, roughly chopped, धनिया के डंठल A pinch of asafoetida (optional), हींग 1 tsp Coriander powder (optional), धनिया पाउडर 1 ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही 1 ½ cup Water, पानी 1 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, roughly chopped, पुदीने के पत्ते 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी ¾ tsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 2-3 tbsp Cashew nut paste, काजू का पेस्ट For Masala 12-15 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 3 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 6-7 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Garnish Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, green chilli, garlic and salt to taste. Make a coarse paste and keep it aside for further use. For Tempering In a handi or kadhai, add ghee once the ghee is hot, add cloves, black cardamom, black peppercorns, bay leaf and let it splutter well. Add onions and saute it well. Add mutton, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste and saute on medium flame. Add dry red chillies and saute it properly. Add coriander stem and mix everything well, add asafoetida, coriander powder and saute it well. Add curd and mix it continuously on medium flame. Add the water and mix it well. Transfer the mutton into the pressure cooker. Take 5 to 6 whistles and remove the pressure cooker from the flame. Rest for a while and open the lid and add mint leaves, coriander leaves, sugar and mix well. Add prepared masala and mix everything well. Once again place the pressure cooker on the flame. Add cashew paste to thicken the gravy. Get one quick boil and remove from the flame. Transfer it onto a serving plate. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. For Masala In a pan add black peppercorns, black cardamom, green cardamom, fennel seeds, salt to taste. Dry roast on low flame until the spices turn aromatic. Add green chilli, asafoetida, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder and saute it well. Add fresh tomato puree, salt to taste, sugar and saute it well on medium flame. Add little water, soaked fenugreek leaves and saute it well. Add boiled potatoes, little water and toss it well. Check the seasoning once. Finish it with lemon juice and mix it well. Transfer it into a serving bowl, garnish it with dry fenugreek leaves, coriander sprig and serve hot with puri or roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #AlooMethi #Simplesabjirecipe #Ranveerbrar #aloomethikisabji #sabzi #Aloosabzi #aloomethiparatha #restaurantstyleAlooMethi #PunjabiAloosabji #aloo #Methi #Alookaparatha #aloomethikaisebanatehain #easyaloomethi

https://youtu.be/wFqjHtrwtSA Chicken Dhaba Masala - https://youtu.be/EIOQDn4dHXY Chicken Angara - https://youtu.be/x3bxGIAlC9E *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** ACHARI CHICKEN Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2 Ingredients For Marination 800 gms Chicken,( thigh/ drumstick) चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादनुसार 1 tbsp Pickle oil, अचार का तेल ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही For Ginger Garlic Paste 1 Green chili, broken into half, हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, peeled, sliced, अदरक 4-5 Garlic cloves, लहसुन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादनुसार For Achari Masala 1 tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ ½ tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना ½ tsp Mustard seeds, सरसों के बीज ½ tsp Nigella seeds, कलौंजी 3 no Dry Kashmiri red chilli, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 1 tsp Dry mango powder, अमचूर पाउडर ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी For Frying Chillies 1 ½ tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 3 large Green chillies, slit or picador chilli, हरी मिर्च Prepared Achari Masala, तैयार किया हुआ अचारी मसाला Salt to taste, नमक स्वादनुसार For Tempering 3 medium size Onion, sliced, प्याज़ Prepared Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 cup Fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी 1 ½ tbsp Prepared Achari Masala, तैयार किया हुआ अचारी मसाला ½ tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Pickle oil, अचार का तेल ½ tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल ½ cup Water, पानी 1 tbsp Prepared Achari Masala, तैयार किया हुआ अचारी मसाला Fried Chillies, cut into half, तले हुए हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Mango pickle, आम का अचार For Garnish Prepared Achari Masala, तैयार किया हुआ अचारी मसाला Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Marination In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, pickle oil and curd. Marinate everything well and keep aside for 5 minutes. For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add green chilli, ginger, garlic cloves, salt to taste and make a smooth paste of it. For Achari Masala In a pan, add fennel seeds, cumin seeds, fenugreek seeds, mustard seeds, nigella seeds. Add dry kashmiri red chilli, and dry roast on low flame until the spices turn aromatic. Transfer it into a bowl, add dry mango powder and sugar. Transfer it into a grinder jar and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Fried Achari Mirch In a pan, add mustard oil on moderate heat. Take large green chillies, slit into the middle and stuffed achari masala. Place the prepared chillies into the hot oil and fry till light golden brown in color. Remove from the flame and keep it aside for further use. For Tempering In the same kadhai, add mustard oil, once the oil gets hot, add onions, ginger garlic green paste and cook on low flame. Once the onions turn light brown in color, add marinated chicken into it. And saute them well. Once chicken gets well roasted, add coriander powder and saute them well. Once coriander powder is roasted well, add tomato puree, achari masala, degi red chilli powder, pickled oil, and mustard oil and mix everything well. Add water, achari masala, prepared fried stuffed chillies, little water and mix well. Cover it with a lid and cook on medium flame. Add mango pickle and once again cover it with a lid and let it cook for a while. Garnish with some achari masala and coriander sprig. https://youtu.be/R1EhlDyO2Q8 𝗠𝗲𝘁𝗵𝗶 𝗠𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗶 𝗣𝗮𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿 - https://youtu.be/wIQexRYcLfc *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** PANEER TIKKA KATHI ROLL Paneer Tikka Roll Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2 Ingredients For Marination 400 gms Paneer, cut into cubes, पनीर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 medium size Green bell pepper, cut into cubes, हरी शिमला मिर्च 1 medium size Red bell pepper, cut into cubes, लाल शिमला मिर्च 1 medium Onion, cut into quarter, प्याज For Hung Curd Mixture ½ cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही 1 tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनिज 2 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग ½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर A pinch of cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tbsp Roasted Gram flour, भुने चने का बेसन 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट For Dough 1 cup Refined flour, मैदा ½ cup Whole wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Curd, दही Water, पानी 1 tsp Ghee, घी For Masala 2 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 5-6 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 4-5 Cloves, लॉन्ग 1 tsp Coriander seeds, धनिया के बीज ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ़ Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी 1 tsp Dry Mint leaves, crushed, पुदीना पत्ता For Salad 1 large Onion, sliced, प्याज 1 Green chilli, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Paneer Tikka ½ tbsp Ghee, घी For Roti 2-3 tsp Ghee, घी For Assembling Salad, सलाद Mint chutney, पुदीने की चटनी Prepared Paneer Tikka, तैयार किया हुआ पनीर टिक्का Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला Ghee for brushing, घी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Marination In a bowl, add paneer, salt to taste, mustard oil, degi red chilli powder, a pinch of asafoetida and marinate it well. Add green bell pepper, red bell pepper, onion and mix everything well. For Hung Curd Mixture In a bowl, add hung curd, mayonnaise, degi red chilli powder, a pinch of asafoetida, and coriander powder. A pinch of cumin powder, salt to taste, roasted gram flour and mix it well. Transfer the marinated paneer mixture into the bowl and mix everything well. Keep aside for 10 minutes. For Dough In a bowl, add refined flour. Whole Wheat flour, salt to taste, curd and water. Knead a semi soft dough. Add ghee and knead it again properly. Cover it with a damp cloth and rest for 10 minutes. For Masala In a bowl, add black cardamom, green cardamom, black peppercorns, cloves, and coriander seeds. Add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, salt to taste, dry fenugreek leaves, dry mint leaves. For Salad In a bowl, add sliced onion, green chilli, salt to taste, lemon juice and mix well. For Paneer Tikka Skewer the marinated vegetables and paneer and set aside till in use. Heat ghee on a grill pan, once it's hot, roast the prepared paneer tikka skewers on the grill pan. Basting with ghee and cook from all sides. Transfer the cooked tikka to the plate and keep aside for further use. For Roti Take a small portion of the dough and roll it thin using a rolling pin. Heat a flat pan and roast it on both sides, apply some ghee and cook until light brown from both sides. Keep aside for further use. For Assembling Paneer Tikka Roll Take one roti and place the salad in the center of the roti. Add some mint chutney, prepared paneer tikka, sprinkle some masala and roll it up. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #PaneerTikka #paneerkathiroll #ranveerbrar #paneerathome #paneerrecipes #kathiroll #tikkabinatandoor #paneertikkaongas #paneertikkawithouttandoor #tandooripaneer #kadhaipaneer #paneerbuttermasala

title: Handi Chicken recipe | हांडी चिकन करी | मटका चिकन | Chicken Curry Handi style | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: मटके वाला चिकन करी |HANDI CHICKEN CURRY RECIPE - I set out to make roast chicken but seeing the size of the chicken that landed in my kitchen, I changed my mind and ended up making Pot chicken instead :) Well, there are never enough chicken recipes, are there? *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭𝗢𝗡 𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗣🍽️
ingredients: 3-4 medium size Onion, sliced, प्याज | 1 whole Chicken, (cut into big pieces)चिकन | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही | ½ tsp Shahi jeera, शाही जीरा | ½ tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 2 no Green cardamom, हरी इलायची | 1 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची | 4-5 Cloves, लॉन्ग | 5-6 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने | 1 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता | 1 tbsp tender Coriander stems, chopped, धनिया के डंठल | ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ½ cup fried Onion, तला हुआ प्याज | ¼ cup fried Onion oil, तले हुए प्याज का तेल | 1 inch Ginger, julienned, अदरक
instructions: For Fried Onion | Cut onion into thin slices and ensure they are almost of the same thickness. | Heat oil in a kadai, add a few onion slices at one time and deep fry until crisp and golden in color. | Transfer them to an absorbent paper. | Keep aside for further use. | For First Marination | In a bowl or a tray place the chicken pieces and add salt to taste and marinate well and keep aside for further use. | For Curd Mixture | In a bowl, add curd, shahi jeera, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder. | Add green cardamom, black cardamom, cloves, black peppercorns, bay leaf. | Now, add fresh mint leaves, coriander leaves, tender coriander stems, ginger garlic paste. | Add salt to taste, fried onions, fried onion oil and mix it well nicely. | Then add the marinated chicken into it and mix it properly. | Mix well and Keep it aside for further use. | In a handi, add marinated chicken, little water and cover it with the lid. | Seal the end of the handi by applying wheat dough across the pot rim to seal it properly. | Keep coals over the lead and let it cook from above. | Place the handi on a slow flame and let it cook for 30 to 40 minutes. | Open the seal and remove lead, add mint leaves, coriander leaves and once again cover it with the lead and mix well. | Now, add ginger julienned and mix well. | Garnish with coriander sprig and serve hot with roti or paratha. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Knives I use 🔪 - https://bit.ly/KnivesIuse *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** POT CHICKEN RECIPE Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 30-35 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Fried Onion 3-4 medium size Onion, sliced, प्याज Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Chicken Marination 1 whole Chicken, (cut into big pieces)चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Curd Mixture 1 ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही ½ tsp Shahi jeera, शाही जीरा ½ tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 2 no Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 4-5 Cloves, लॉन्ग 5-6 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 1 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता few Mint leaves, roughly torn, पुदीना पत्ता few Coriander leaves, roughly torn, धनिया पत्ता 1 tbsp tender Coriander stems, chopped, धनिया के डंठल ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ cup fried Onion, तला हुआ प्याज ¼ cup fried Onion oil, तले हुए प्याज का तेल Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन Little water, पानी Other Ingredients few fresh Mint leaves, roughly torn, पुदीना पत्ता few Coriander leaves, roughly torn, धनिया पत्ता Coal, कोयला For Garnish 1 inch Ginger, julienned, अदरक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Fried Onion Cut onion into thin slices and ensure they are almost of the same thickness. Heat oil in a kadai, add a few onion slices at one time and deep fry until crisp and golden in color. Transfer them to an absorbent paper. Keep aside for further use. For First Marination In a bowl or a tray place the chicken pieces and add salt to taste and marinate well and keep aside for further use. For Curd Mixture In a bowl, add curd, shahi jeera, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder. Add green cardamom, black cardamom, cloves, black peppercorns, bay leaf. Now, add fresh mint leaves, coriander leaves, tender coriander stems, ginger garlic paste. Add salt to taste, fried onions, fried onion oil and mix it well nicely. Then add the marinated chicken into it and mix it properly. Mix well and Keep it aside for further use. For Gravy In a handi, add marinated chicken, little water and cover it with the lid. Seal the end of the handi by applying wheat dough across the pot rim to seal it properly. Keep coals over the lead and let it cook from above. Place the handi on a slow flame and let it cook for 30 to 40 minutes. Open the seal and remove lead, add mint leaves, coriander leaves and once again cover it with the lead and mix well. Now, add ginger julienned and mix well. Garnish with coriander sprig and serve hot with roti or paratha. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Potchickenrecipe #Chickencurry #Ranveerbrar #dhabachicken #Punjabichicken #chickenbiryani #chickencurrykaisebanaye #chickencurrybananekividhi #chickenrecipe #chickenreciperanveerbrar #tandoorichicken #roastchicken #chickeninoven #binatandoor #chickenmasala #chickentikkamasala #butterchicken

title: Eggless Christmas Plum cake | बिना अंडे &ओवेन का केक | No Oven plum pudding | प्लम केक | ChefRanveer
description: बिना अंडे का क्रिसमस केक / पुडिंग | EGGLESS CHRISTMAS CAKE/PUDDING What's Christmas without the traditional Pudding/Cake? Here's my recipe.. And some stories to spice up your festive season #ChristmasCake #ChristmasPudding #Raneerbrar ***********************
ingredients: ½ cup Butter, मक्खन | ⅔ cups Brown sugar, ब्राउन शुगर | 4-5 Almonds, chopped, बादाम | 4-5 Walnuts, chopped, अखरोट | 4-5 Pistachios, blanched, peeled, chopped, पिस्ता | 4-5 dried Cranberries, chopped, क्रैनबेरी | 3-4 Candied cherry, कैंडीड चेरी | 3-4 Apricot, chopped, खुबानी | 2 tbsp Tutti frutti, टूटी फ़्रूटी | 2-4 Black Raisins, काली किशमिश | 4 tbsp Orange juice, संतरा का जूस | 2 tsp Vanilla extract, वनीला एसेंस | 4-5 Dates, खजूर | 2 medium size Carrot, grated, गाजर (optional) | A pinch of salt, नमक | 1 tsp Christmas spice powder, क्रिसमस स्पाइस पाउडर | ½ tsp Ginger powder, सोंठ का पाउडर | 1 cup Refined flour, मैदा | 1 cup fresh Bread crumbs, ताजे ब्रेड क्रम | ½-2 tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा | 1 tsp Oil, तेल | 1 tsp Lemon zest, लेमन जेस्ट | 3 tbsp Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च | 6 tbsp Sugar, चीनी | ¼ tsp Vanilla essence, वनीला एसेंस | 1 tsp Butter, मक्खन | ½ cup Icing sugar, आइसिंग शुगर | 1 tbsp Water, पानी | ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
instructions: In a bowl, add chopped almonds, walnuts, pistachios, dried cranberries, candied cherry, apricot, tutti frutti, black raisins, orange juice, vanilla extract and dates. | Microwave the a minute. | In a small bowl, add baking soda, oil and mix well. | Transfer this into the mixture and mix everything properly. | For Steaming | In a pressure cooker place the small cooking stand, add water into it. | Take the savarin mould and grease it nicely with butter. | Transfer the prepared mixture into the grease mould and set it nicely. | Cover it with butter paper and foil paper, and seal it properly. | Place the mould carefully inside the cooker and cover it with the lid and steam for 20 minutes on low to medium flame. | Check the pudding with a toothpick by poking it in the center, if it's clear take the pudding mould out. | For Custard Sauce | In a bowl, add milk, cornstarch, sugar and whisk it well. | Transfer it into a sauce pot and whisk it continuously on medium flame. | that there is no layer of cream. | Strain the custard sauce and keep aside for further use. | In a double boiler, place the bowl, add icing sugar, water, lemon juice and mix well | Until the icing is http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** EGGLESS CHRISTMAS CAKE/PUDDING Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 25- 30 minutes Serve 2 Ingredients For Pudding ½ cup Butter, मक्खन ⅔ cups Brown sugar, ब्राउन शुगर Little water, पानी 4-5 Almonds, chopped, बादाम 4-5 Walnuts, chopped, अखरोट 4-5 Pistachios, blanched, peeled, chopped, पिस्ता 4-5 dried Cranberries, chopped, क्रैनबेरी 3-4 Candied cherry, कैंडीड चेरी 3-4 Apricot, chopped, खुबानी 2 tbsp Tutti frutti, टूटी फ़्रूटी 2-4 Black Raisins, काली किशमिश 4 tbsp Orange juice, संतरा का जूस 2 tsp Vanilla extract, वनीला एसेंस 4-5 Dates, खजूर 2 medium size Carrot, grated, गाजर (optional) Mixed Nuts, मेवा A pinch of salt, नमक 1 tsp Christmas spice powder, क्रिसमस स्पाइस पाउडर ½ tsp Ginger powder, सोंठ का पाउडर 1 cup Refined flour, मैदा 1 cup fresh Bread crumbs, ताजे ब्रेड क्रम ½-2 tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा 1 tsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Lemon zest, लेमन जेस्ट For Custard Sauce ½ liter Milk, दूध 3 tbsp Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च 6 tbsp Sugar, चीनी ¼ tsp Vanilla essence, वनीला एसेंस 1 tsp Butter, मक्खन For Icing ½ cup Icing sugar, आइसिंग शुगर 1 tbsp Water, पानी ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस Other Ingredients Butter, for greasing, मक्खन For Garnish Candied cherry, कैंडीड चेरी Apricot, chopped, खुबानी fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता Icing sugar, आइसिंग शुगर Process For Pudding In a bowl, add chopped almonds, walnuts, pistachios, dried cranberries, candied cherry, apricot, tutti frutti, black raisins, orange juice, vanilla extract and dates. Microwave the nuts for a minute. In a sauce pot, add butter once the butter is melted, add brown sugar and melt the sugar a little bit. Add a little water and mix well. Keep it aside for further use. In a bowl, add grated carrots, soaked nuts and mix it well. Add a pinch of salt, christmas spice powder, dry ginger powder, refined flour, fresh bread crumbs and mix everything well and keep it aside for a minute. In a small bowl, add baking soda, oil and mix well. Transfer this into the mixture and mix everything properly. For Steaming In a pressure cooker place the small cooking stand, add water into it. Take the savarin mould and grease it nicely with butter. Transfer the prepared mixture into the grease mould and set it nicely. Cover it with butter paper and foil paper, and seal it properly. Place the mould carefully inside the cooker and cover it with the lid and steam for 20 minutes on low to medium flame. Check the pudding with a toothpick by poking it in the center, if it's clear take the pudding mould out. For Custard Sauce In a bowl, add milk, cornstarch, sugar and whisk it well. Transfer it into a sauce pot and whisk it continuously on medium flame. Add vanilla essence and whisk continuously. Once the custard is cooked properly to a thick consistency. Remove from the flame. And let it cooldown at room temperature. add butter on top of it so that there is no layer of cream. Strain the custard sauce and keep aside for further use. For Icing In a double boiler, place the bowl, add icing sugar, water, lemon juice and mix well Until the icing is smooth and thick enough. For Garnishing Once the pudding is cooldown, demould the pudding on a serving dish. Spread the icing evenly on christmas pudding, pour the prepared custard sauce in the center of the pudding. Place the candied cherries, apricot, fresh mint leaves and dust a little icing sugar on top of it. ******************************* 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #christmascake #christmaspudding #plumcake #egglessplumcake #egglesscake #egglesspuddingrecipe #plumcakewithoutoven #plumcakewithoutalcohol #Christmascakeranveerbrar #cakereciperanveerbrar #cakekaisebanatehain #cakerecipenoOven #egglesscakeinmicrowave #

http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** MUTTON RARA Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 30-40 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Mutton Marination 800 gms Mutton (with bones) मैरिनेटेड मटन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 ½ heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 heaped tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 2 tsp Fried Onion oil, तला हुआ प्याज का तेल For Keema Marination 400 gms Mutton kheema, मटन खीमा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 2-3 Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च 2-4 Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन ½ inch Ginger, chopped, अदरक few Coriander stems, chopped, धनिया के डंठल 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर For Ginger Garlic Paste 2 Green chilli, हरी मिर्च 4-5 Garlic cloves, लहसुन ½ inch Ginger, peeled, slice, अदरक Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Tempering 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 tbsp Fried Onion oil, तला हुआ प्याज का तेल 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2-4 Cloves, लॉन्ग Prepared Ginger Garlic Paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 4 medium size Onion, chopped प्याज Marinated Mutton, मैरिनेटेड मटन Marinated Keema, मैरिनेटेड मटन खीमा 1 cup Fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी ½ cup Mutton stock, मटन स्टॉक 1 tsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला A pinch of Nutmeg, grated, जायफल For Masala ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 2-4 Cloves, लॉन्ग 6-7 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 2-4 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 2-3 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Mutton Marination In a bowl, add mutton, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, coriander powder. Add degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, fried onion oil and mix everything well. Keep aside for 5-10 minutes. For Keema Marination In a bowl, add mutton keema, salt to taste, curd, green chilies, garlic cloves, ginger. Add coriander stems, coriander powder and marinate everything well. For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add green chili, garlic cloves, ginger, salt to taste and make a smooth paste of it. For Tempering In a large sauce pot or handi, add ghee, fried onion oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds. Add black cardamom, cloves and let them crackle for a few seconds. Add prepared ginger garlic paste and saute it well. Add onion and saute until it's translucent or light pink in color. Add marinated mutton and keep cooking on medium flame. Cover it with the lid and let the mutton cook in its own juices for 5-6 minutes. Add marinated keema and keep sauteing for 10 minutes. Add tomato puree and mix it well. Cook on medium flame till releases its oil Add mutton stock and mix it well and then cover it with a lid and cook on low flame for 10-15 minutes. Add prepared masala, grate nutmeg and stir well. Transfer into a serving bowl or plate. Garnish with coriander sprig and serve hot with paratha. For Masala In a pan, add cinnamon stick, cloves, black peppercorns, green cardamom, bay leaf. Add salt to taste and dry roast on low flame until the spices turn aromatic. Transfer it into a grinder jar and grind it into a fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #MuttonRara #Muttoncurry #Ranveerbrar #Muttonraracurry #Raramutton #Muttonraan #Muttonbiryani #hyderabadiMuttoncurry #मटनरारा #मटनकरी #Muttonrecipe #muttonsukka #karikulambu #roganjosh #gosht #punjabimuttoncurry #raragosht

raw_text: EGGLESS GINGERBREAD | बिना अंडे का जिंजरब्रेड - Christmas isn't complete without Gingerbread, right? And for any confectionery to turn out right, dough resting and mixing are crucial. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Fruit Cake - https://youtu.be/LS08g5eTTjc Eggless Plum Cake - https://youtu.be/XcQQALrJd84 Eggnog - https://youtu.be/sdLjpnRZfEo *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** EGGLESS GINGERBREAD HOUSE Preparation Time 25 minutes Cooking Time 10 minutes Baking Time 15 minutes Serves: 4 Ingredients ⅓ cup Water ¼ Cup Jaggery or Molasses ¼ Cup Brown sugar 1 tsp Vanilla essence 2 tbsp Butter 2 Cups Refined flour 2 tbsp GingerBread spice ½ tsp Baking powder ¼ tsp Baking soda 1 tbsp Condensed milk For Spice Powder 15 gms Cinnamon stick 5 gms Cloves 5 gms Star anise 3 gms Fennel seeds 15 gms Dry Ginger powder 1 Mace 2 Dry Button chili 5 gms Coriander seeds Salt to taste For Icing ¼ cup Water 1 ⅓ cups Icing sugar 1 ½ tsp Lemon juice For Caramel Syrup 1 cup Caster sugar 1 tbsp Water For Garnish ½ cup White chocolate ½ tsp Green powder color ½ cup White chocolate ½ tsp Red powder color Colorful chocolate candies Colorful sprinklers Icing sugar Process Heat jaggery in a pot on low flame. Add brown sugar and mix until the sugar is dissolved. Add butter, stir till melted and sauce is creamy. Turn off the flame. Add gingerbread spice in the warm sauce and mix well to release its flavor. Rest for 2-3 minutes. Add refined flour, baking powder, baking soda to the sauce and mix nicely till it forms a soft and sticky dough. Add condensed milk and vanilla essence, incorporate it in the dough properly. Dust your hands with refined flour and smooth out the dough. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and rest it for 30 minutes in a cool place (do not refrigerate) so it will harden. Sprinkle flour over dough and rolling pin. Roll dough to a 1/4-inch thickness. Use additional flour to avoid sticking. Rub a little flour over the surface of the dough. Place the moulds on the dough, as many as moulds as will fit on the dough. Use a small sharp knife to cut out the moulds from the dough, wiping the knife surface clean frequently. Cut out the following patterns for the gingerbread house template, Two rectangles, 3 by 5 inches, to make the front and back of the house. Two rectangles, 4 by 6 inches for the roof. Line a baking tray with butter paper and preheat the oven at 170*c. Cut out cookies with desired cutter and space cookies 1 ½ -inches apart. Bake the cookies in batches. Bake in a pre- heated oven at 160*c for 10-15 minutes. Remove cookie sheet from oven and allow the cookies to stand until the cookies are firm enough to move to a wire rack. For Assembling the GingerBread House Glue the two roof pieces to the pitched roofline of the house. Then, similarly, glue the sides and roof of the entryway together with icing. Attach the entryway to the front of the house. Using the icing, stick sweets around the door and on the front of the house. Dust the roof with icing sugar for a snowy effect. For Icing In a bowl, add water, icing sugar, lemon juice and mix well on a double boiler. Until the icing is smooth and thick enough. For Caramel Syrup In a heavy bottom sauce pan, add caster sugar, water on medium flame. Allow the mixture to dissolve without stirring, until it has reduced slightly and becomes golden amber in color. आलू 2 Bread slice, trim the edges, ब्रेड स्लाइस ½ tsp Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Green Chutney ½ cup Coriander leaves, धनिया पत्ता ¼ cup Mint leaves, पुदीने के पत्ते ½
