tsp Fennel seeds, सॉफ 10-12 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Frying Pattice 3-4 tbsp Ghee, घी For Assembling Prepared Pattice, तैयार पैटिस Prepared Chole, पके हुए छोले Green chutney, हरी चटनी Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला For Salad 2 medium size Onion, chopped, प्याज 1 medium Tomato, chopped, टमाटर 1 Green chili, हरी मिर्च For Garnish Pomegranate pearl, अनार के दाने Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Cooking Chickpeas In a pressure cooker, add soaked chickpeas, salt to taste, green chillies, black cardamom. Add black peppercorns, cloves, water, garlic cloves, ginger. Cover and pressure cook for 2-3 whistles. Once the pressure releases, open the cooker. Strain the chole and keep aside for further use. For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic, green chili, salt to taste and make a paste of it. For Tempering In a handi, add ghee once it's hot, add bay leaf, dry kashmiri red chili, cumin seeds. Add coriander seeds and let it splutter well. Add prepared ginger garlic paste and saute well. Add a little water and mix well. Add cooked chickpeas, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder. Add asafoetida, coriander powder and saute it well. Add water, tamarind pulp, jaggery and mix everything well. Cook on medium flame for 5-10 minutes. In a serving plate place the prepared pattice, prepared chole on the other side. Along with chopped onion, tomato, green chili. Add green chutney and sprinkle some prepared masala on top of it. Garnish it with pomegranate pearls, coriander sprig and serve hot. For Pattice In a large bowl, add boiled frying potato, bread slice, cornstarch, salt to taste and mix everything well. Now, take the potato mixture and divide into equal portions. Take each portion and roll in between your palms and flatten it bit Repeat it with remaining mixture. Heat ghee in a pan for shallow frying. Fry the patties from both the sides till golden brown in color. Keep aside for further use. For Green Chutney In a bowl, add coriander leaves, mint leaves, ginger, garlic, salt to taste, green chili. Add sugar, oil. Transfer this into a grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. Transfer it into a bowl, add curd and mix well. Keep aside for further use. For Masala In a non-stick pan, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, black peppercorns, salt to taste. Dry roast on low flame until the spices turn aromatic. Transfer it into a grinder jar and grind into a fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** #CholeTikkiChaat #TikkiChole #Ranveerbrar #Cholekulche #Ragdapattice #cholesamosa #alootikki #samosachaat #Chaatrecipe

title: कुरकुरा आलू का नाश्ता | Crispy Potato Pancake | special Potato snack recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: आलू का चीला | Potato Pancake / Cheela - आलू हो हाथ में तो आप कुछ भी बना सकते हैं . If you need a never ending list of recipes and possibilities, then always have Potatoes on hand! #Aloocheela #Potatorecipe #Ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭𝗢𝗡 𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗣🍽️
ingredients: 1 large Potato (आलू) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | ½ tsp Turmeric powder (हल्दी पाउडर) | 4-5 tbsp Oil (तेल) | 150 gm Paneer - small dice (पनीर) | 1 small Tomato - diced (टमाटर) | 1 small Onion - diced (प्याज़) | 1 fresh Green Chilli (हरी मिर्च) | 1 inch Ginger (अदरक) | 4-5 cloves Garlic (लहसुन) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 2 tbsp Oil (तेल) | 1 tbsp Curd (दही) | ½ tbsp Tamarind Chutney (इमली की चटनी)
instructions: For Stuffing | Firstly in a mortal pistol crush garlic, green chilli, ginger, salt and keep aside for further use. | In a pan heat oil and add the crushed paste and saute for a few seconds. | Now add onion and saute for a minute then add tomato, paneer and saute for 2-3 minutes. | Finish it with few coriander leaves then switch off the flames and keep aside for further use. | For Assembling Aloo Cheela | In a bowl add grated potato, salt, turmeric powder, oil, coriander leaves and mix everything properly and keep aside for some time. | Now in a pan speed some potato mixture and cook it on medium heat until golden brown and crispy from both sides. | Remove on a plate and keep spoonful of the stuffing on it and serve. | Or can put the stuffing in and then fold it over and cook until golden brown and crispy then serve hot with some curd, tamarind chutney, carrot julienne, beetroot julienne and coriander leaves. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Knives I use 🔪 - https://bit.ly/KnivesIuse *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** ALOO KA CHEELA Preparation time : 10 minutes Cooking time : 20-25 minutes Servings : 2 Ingredients 1 large Potato (आलू) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) ½ tsp Turmeric powder (हल्दी पाउडर) 4-5 tbsp Oil (तेल) few Coriander Leaves - roughly torn (धनिया पत्ता) For Stuffing 150 gm Paneer - small dice (पनीर) 1 small Tomato - diced (टमाटर) 1 small Onion - diced (प्याज़) 1 fresh Green Chilli (हरी मिर्च) 1 inch Ginger (अदरक) 4-5 cloves Garlic (लहसुन) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) 2 tbsp Oil (तेल) few Coriander Leaves - roughly torn (धनिया पत्ता) For Garnish Coriander Leaves (धनिया पत्ता) 1 tbsp Curd (दही) ½ tbsp Tamarind Chutney (इमली की चटनी) Carrot - julienned (गाजर) Beetroot - julienned (चुकंदर) Process For Stuffing Firstly in a mortal pistol crush garlic, green chilli, ginger, salt and keep aside for further use. In a pan heat oil and add the crushed paste and saute for a few seconds. Now add onion and saute for a minute then add tomato, paneer and saute for 2-3 minutes. Finish it with few coriander leaves then switch off the flames and keep aside for further use. For Assembling Aloo Cheela In a bowl add grated potato, salt, turmeric powder, oil, coriander leaves and mix everything properly and keep aside for some time. Now in a pan speed some potato mixture and cook it on medium heat until golden brown and crispy from both sides. Remove on a plate and keep spoonful of the stuffing on it and serve. Or can put the stuffing in and then fold it over and cook until golden brown and crispy then serve hot with some curd, tamarind chutney, carrot julienne, beetroot julienne and coriander leaves. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #alooparatha #crispypotato #frenchfries #rosti #roesti #potatopancake #alookacheela #alookaparatha #paratharecipe #breakfastparatha #breakfastrecipe #kidsrecipe #potato

title: Healthy Paya Soup Recipe | मटन पाया का शोरबा | Winter special Lamb Trotters soup | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: पाया शोरबा | PAYA SOUP | LAMB TROTTERS SOUP - One of the most popular dishes for the colder months, Paya soup is super healthy too. Also popular as Lamb Trotters soup or Goat Trotters soup, here's the recipe how I learnt it. 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
ingredients: 2 tsp Vinegar, सिरका | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 kg Lamb Trotters cut into ½ inch pieces 2, पाया | 1 tbsp Oil, तेल | 2 tbsp Ghee, घी | 1 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता | 2 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची | 2 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची | 2 Cloves, लॉन्ग | 5-6 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने | 2 large Onion, slice, प्याज | 2 Green chillies, हरी मिर्च | 2-3 Garlic cloves, लहसुन | 1 kg Lamb Trotters cut into ½ inch pieces 2, पाया | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 3-4 cups Water, पानी | ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही | ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी | 2-4 Cloves, लॉन्ग | A pinch of asafoetida, हींग | 1 inch Ginger, julienned, अदरक | 2 Green chillies, without seeds, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च
instructions: For Cleaning Paya | In a sauce pot, add water, vinegar, salt to taste and let the water come to a roaring boil. | Add lamb trotters in it, and boil for two minutes. | Once the trotters are clean, switch off the flame. | Remove the trotters and keep aside for further use. | Take a pressure cooker, add ghee, oil. | Once it's hot, add bay leaf, black peppercorns. | Add green cardamom, black cardamom, cloves and let it splutter well. | Add onion, garlic, ginger, green chilli and saute it well. | Once the onions turn pinkish in colour, add lamb trotters and saute them nicely til light brown in colour. | Now, add prepared curd mixture and mix it well. | Add salt to taste, turmeric powder, water and mix everything well. | After that, cover it with the lid and take four to five whistles on medium flame. | Once the paya is cooked well, turn off the flame. | Open the lid and strain the soup in a large bowl and keep aside for further use. | Now, pour the prepared tadka over the strain soup, add the lamb trotters and give it a stir. | Put the prepared soup again in the handi and cook for 5 minutes till it boils. | Transfer it into a soup bowl along with lamb trotters. | Garnish it with coriander stem, fried onion, ginger, lemon wedge, mint leaves and serve hot. | For Curd Mixture | In a bowl, add curd, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder and mix well. | Keep aside for further use. | In a small pan, add ghee once it's hot, add cloves, asafoetida, let it splutter well. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Also popular as Lamb Trotters soup or Goat Trotters soup, here's the recipe how I learnt it. 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Cooker Mutton Pulao - https://youtu.be/iQB1vTgrUoA Handi Mutton - https://youtu.be/QFG7ftYNgLM Fauji Mutton Curry - https://youtu.be/xqQsshnvDVo *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** PAYA SOUP Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 30-40 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Cleaning Paya Water, पानी 2 tsp Vinegar, सिरका Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 kg Lamb Trotters cut into ½ inch pieces 2, पाया For Soup 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता 2 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 2 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2 Cloves, लॉन्ग 5-6 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 2 large Onion, slice, प्याज 2 Green chillies, हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, peeled, slice, अदरक 2-3 Garlic cloves, लहसुन few Coriander steam, धनिया के डंठल 1 kg Lamb Trotters cut into ½ inch pieces 2, पाया Curd Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 3-4 cups Water, पानी For Curd Mixture ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Tadka 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी 2-4 Cloves, लॉन्ग A pinch of asafoetida, हींग For Garnish 1 inch Ginger, julienned, अदरक 2 Green chillies, without seeds, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च Fried Onion, तला हुआ प्याज Coriander steam, chopped, धनिया के डंठल Lemon wedge, नींबू की फलियां Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता Process For Cleaning Paya In a sauce pot, add water, vinegar, salt to taste and let the water come to a roaring boil. Add lamb trotters in it, and boil for two minutes. Once the trotters are clean, switch off the flame. Remove the trotters and keep aside for further use. For Soup Take a pressure cooker, add ghee, oil. Once it's hot, add bay leaf, black peppercorns. Add green cardamom, black cardamom, cloves and let it splutter well. Add onion, garlic, ginger, green chilli and saute it well. Once the onions turn pinkish in colour, add lamb trotters and saute them nicely til light brown in colour. Now, add prepared curd mixture and mix it well. Add salt to taste, turmeric powder, water and mix everything well. After that, cover it with the lid and take four to five whistles on medium flame. Once the paya is cooked well, turn off the flame. Open the lid and strain the soup in a large bowl and keep aside for further use. Now, pour the prepared tadka over the strain soup, add the lamb trotters and give it a stir. Put the prepared soup again in the handi and cook for 5 minutes till it boils. Transfer it into a soup bowl along with lamb trotters. Garnish it with coriander stem, fried onion, ginger, lemon wedge, mint leaves and serve hot. For Curd Mixture In a bowl, add curd, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder and mix well. Keep aside for further use. For Tadka In a small pan, add ghee once it's hot, add cloves, asafoetida, let it splutter well. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Payasoup #Payasouprecipe #Ranveerbrar #मटनपायाकास्वादिष्टशोरबा #goatlegsoup #Paya #goattrotters #goatsoup #karikuzhambu #karisoup #kadasoup #aatucurry #payacurry #muttonsoup #मटनपायाकाशोरबा #मटनपाया

Cooking Rice In a pot, add water for boiling, salt to taste, oil and let it boil. Once the water starts boiling. Add soaked sella basmati rice and let it cook on medium heat until 70% cooked. Once done, strain the rice and keep aside for further use. For Restaurant Style Fried Rice Heat oil in a wok, once it's hot, add ginger, garlic and saute it well. Add carrot, sweet corn, cabbage, ginger, green chilli, Stir fry on high flame without overcooking vegetables. Add soy sauce, vinegar, white pepper powder, french beans and saute it well. Add cooked rice and saute it well. Add salt to taste, sugar, vinegar and toss it well. Now, add spring onion, sprinkle a little water. Cover it with the lid and cook for 2 minutes. Toss everything well on high flame. Garnish with spring onion and serve hot. For Pot Rice For Cooking Rice In a pot, add water for boiling, salt to taste, oil and let it boil. Once the water starts boiling. Add soaked sella basmati rice and let it cook on medium heat until 70% cooked. Once done, strain the rice and keep aside for further use. For Pot Rice (Gravy) Heat oil in a wok, once it's hot, add ginger, garlic and saute it well. Add onion, dry red chillies, star anise and saute well. Add one by one all the vegetables along with paneer and toss them well. Add a little water, soy sauce and mix well. Cover it with the lid and cook on medium flame until it boils. Add spring onion white part, green chilli sauce and mix well. Add water, salt to taste, vinegar, sugar, ginger, cornstarch slurry, toasted sesame oil mix well. Cook until the sauce thickens and vegetables are cooked. Now, add spring onion at the end. Add the cooked rice in a serving pot, pour the prepared gravy on top of it and serve hot. #FriedRice #FriedRiceRecipe #Ranveerbrar #वेजफ्राइडराइस #restaurantstylevegfriedrice #chinesefriedrice #शेजवानफ्राइडराइस #eggfriedrice #friedriceranveerbrar

ingredients: 2 tbsp Mustard Oil (सरसों का तेल) | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds (जीरा) | 1 medium Onion - chopped (प्याज़) | ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | ½ tsp Turmeric Powder (हल्दी पाउडर) | 2-3 fresh Green Chillies - chopped (हरी मिर्च) | 1 medium Tomato - chopped (टमाटर) | 1½ cup Split Black Gram - soaked (उड़द दाल) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds - roasted (जीरा) | 2 tbsp Coriander Leaves - chopped (धनिया के पत्ते)
